text.value:
DELETE FROM dbo.hcProviderBillingCode
FROM dbo.hcProviderBillingCode t
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.AppointmentPropagation ap
    WHERE ap.PropagatingProviderBillingCodeId = t.id
);
